eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Ada, ID; at 5:00 PM on JUN 5, 2026 Effective until 7:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Endangered Missing Person Alert system. Meridian Police Department is looking for an endangered missing person who suffers from dementia and is diabetic. He is a 70 year old male with grey hair and was last seen wearing a grey quarter zip sweater with a white t-shirt under driving a grey Honda Accord with Idaho Plates 1A5035P. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this missing person please contact the Meridian Police Department at 208-888-6678.
